I love McDonald’s, but this app is one of the most frustrating apps I use regularly.

A few of the biggest problems:

• It logs me out constantly, often once a week or more. There’s nothing more annoying than sitting in the drive-thru trying to pull up a reward code and discovering you’ve been logged out again.

• The login experience is baffling. The app logs me out regularly, then forces me to wait for an email link to sign back in. Why is there no Face ID support? Why is there no password option? This is a fast-food app, not online banking. Accessing rewards should take seconds, not require an email verification process every time I’m unexpectedly logged out.

• Mobile order codes should not be alphanumeric. Staff frequently mishear letters, even when I spell them phonetically. A numeric-only code would be much faster and less error-prone.

• There are far too many unnecessary animations. When I’m ordering food, I want speed and clarity, not flashy transitions. The app feels like it’s trying to entertain me instead of helping me complete a task.

• The constant pop-ups and promotions are irritating. Every time I open the app, I’m greeted with another offer or splash screen, and it’s often not immediately obvious how to dismiss it. Just let me get to my rewards or place my order.

• Ordering is far more difficult than it should be. Search is weak, finding items can be tedious, and favorites are not nearly as useful as they could be. The interface feels cluttered, slow, and overdesigned. I’d rather get a root canal than try to customize an order through this app.

What frustrates me most is that McDonald’s has one of the best rewards programs around, but the app gets in the way of using it. If it weren’t for the points and deals, I would uninstall this app immediately.

I genuinely don’t understand how it maintains such a high rating. The app needs less marketing, fewer animations, and a much stronger focus on speed, reliability, and usability. Right now it feels like it was designed by people trying to impress a marketing department rather than people who actually use it to buy food.
McDonald’s is my fav!!!! #imlovinit #bigmacextramacsauce
Thé app crashes EVERY TIME I need to redownload it everytime
i love mickey donald’s

J’aime bien commander via l’app McDo. Mais on dirait que McDo fait par exprès pour la rendre désagréable pour la clientèle. Quelques exemples :
- Dès qu’on ouvre l’app, un pop-up apparaît, qu’on n’a pas le choix de répondre “Commander” ou “Peut-être plus tard”.
- Choisir un trio est inutilement compliqué, par exemple lorsqu’on choisit la boisson - au lieu de nous lister par exemple Coke Petit, Coke Moyen, Coke Grand, Coke format pour enfant… ensuite Coke Diète Petit, Coke Diète Moyen (OK…) - pourquoi ne pas simplement nous faire choisir la boisson, ensuite le format ? Car pendant qu’on cherche ce qu’on veut dans la très longue liste, c’est comme si l’app nous obligeait à voir leur menu en entier. Ce n’est pas efficace pour le client, et si c’est volontaire de la part de McDo, c’est regrettable. Et après tout ça, on nous offre un Exclusive McValue Add-on… OK, si je prends un trio Quart de Livre, quelles sont les chances que je prenne en plus un Cheeseburger pour cette commande ? Encore ici, on me fait perdre mon temps - si j’ai si faim, je sais que je peux rajouter d’autres items à la commande ! On est loin du fameux “Un chausson avec ça ?”, c'est devenu exagéré.

C’est la même chose pour leurs terminaux de commande en restaurant, tellement des étapes supplémentaires qui bouffent notre temps, notre patience et qui tentent seulement de nous gaver davantage. Désolé mais c’est pourtant bien ce que j’en décode.
